claim: Provide an evidence-append front door: a sanctioned entry point (a Mutation type plus a mix task) for appending a dated evidence entry to an existing belief. Evidence is the one sanctioned in-place growth point on an immutable node, yet it is the only common write without tooling - every append today is an ad-hoc scripted Store write.

evidence.detail: Three specimens in one session (postscript 8): the a501 link-back replay, the c049 dep re-point (whose Mutation clauses append evidence internally but expose no evidence-only type), and the close's own four appends (a519, a500, and the a507 retro-pairs on a521/c062) - each a hand-rolled script against CB.Belief.Store. Preflight 2026-06-11: backlog tag-family overlap only; no semantic conflict.
